title: dimeria hohenackeri subsp. kodaguensis
intro: Dimeria hohenackeri subsp. kodaguensis, also known as Kodagu dimeria, is a subspecies of grass in the family Poaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Dimeria hohenackeri subsp. kodaguensis include its potential to treat various health conditions such as fever, cold, and respiratory issues due to its expectorant properties. The plant can be used to prepare herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are used to treat various health ailments and promote overall well-being.
